meaning: n.泛光照明,强力照明,泛光灯,照明灯,泛光vt.用泛光灯照亮
examples: Of a floodlight. The scattered light falling outside the beam.
The white floodlight shines through the wispy tule and makes thin shadows.
Industry: Garden landscape lamp pole lamp lawn lamp floodlight pier, bridge lamps.
Outside, while Anton had been changing the floodlight, Hadley had thought, I will offer him coffee.
Ballymena boss Tommy Wright countered that "the floodlight failure only affected Ballymena, not Lisburn Distillery".
